_comment: EDNY DE regression: the RUNWAY_VACATED-impossibility veto. Whisper sometimes drops 'start' from 'Piste 06 startfrei' (the departure readback), leaving a bare 'Piste 06 frei' that matches the RUNWAY_VACATED rule. Without the veto, the tower replied 'lesen Sie die Startfreigabe zurueck' and the deadlock looped over and over. The DE adjustment {RUNWAY_VACATED, was_airborne=false, readback_pending=true} -> READBACK rescues the malformed readback. Driven on the ground, so was_airborne stays false; readback_pending becomes true after the Tower's 'Start frei' clearance.
name: EDNY DE RUNWAY_VACATED impossibility veto (Bullet F.1)

say.note: Setup: prime TOWER_CONTACT so the next 'ready for departure' lands on the Tower template directly.
1 - Tower: ready for departure -> Start frei (readback_pending=true after this). Phrasing mirrors the unit-test corpus that confirms the rule matches.
say.text: Friedrichshafen Turm Hotel Bravo Delta Sierra Victor am Rollhalt Piste 06 abflugbereit

say.note: 2 - Pilot: Whisper-mangled readback 'Piste 06 frei' (start dropped). Without the veto this matches RUNWAY_VACATED and triggers the 'lesen Sie die Startfreigabe zurueck' loop. With was_airborne=false + readback_pending=true the adjustment demotes to READBACK -> silent ack in Pattern/DEPARTURE_CLEARED.
say.text: Piste 06 frei Hotel Bravo Delta Sierra Victor
